bullets: Engineered a unified settings navigation package adopted across 18+ micro-frontend apps, accelerating development cycles by 20%
Migrated login to Next.js, revamped UIs with NAOS design system; migrated 2FA from PHP Twig to React with 90%+ test coverage
Redesigned checkout for 2.5M+ users to a 3-step flow, leading to 15% conversion uplift
Led A/B testing and onboarding revamp with address autosuggest, building FE/BE systems with Omni dashboards
Reduced support tickets by 12% in the senders module (10K+ weekly users) via automated domain authentication
Modernized orders page for the B2B portal, enhancing productivity for 4K+ franchises across 4 countries
Achieved 30% decrease in support ticket volume by developing receipt generation UIs with React and Redux
Delivered a client-side recommendation system leveraging a proprietary rule engine for product upsell and cross-sell
Integrated CleverTap into ThyroNext for real-time analytics, driving retention and engagement
Led data modeling in a 4-member team, delivering an analytics solution for PepsiCo North America in under 3 months
Built a real-time write-back sync system for a live app deployed to 16K+ stores
Automated reporting across 8+ teams by developing a real-time Power BI dashboard used by 100+ employees
Reduced pipeline execution time by 6× by replacing Power Automate with Azure Data Factory

projects.title: Steganography
